title: valeriana atlantica
intro: Valeriana atlantica, also known as the Atlantic valerian or valerian root, is a perennial flowering plant species in the family Valerianaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its sedative, anti-anxiety, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Valeriana atlantica include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle and joint pain. The herbal preparations of Valeriana atlantica include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce symptoms of insomnia, and alleviate menstrual cramps.
